errors.emailSendFailed: We couldn’t send the confirmation email. Please try again.

errors.invalidLink: This link is invalid or has expired.
errors.noPassword: Your account has no password to reset.

errors.usernameChars: Use letters, numbers and underscores only.

settings.title: Edit profile
settings.subtitle: Manage your profile and account.
settings.avatarTooLarge: Image is too large, even after compression.

account.title: Account
account.notVerified: Your email is not verified yet.
account.pending: Waiting for confirmation — open the link sent to {email}.
account.linkExpired: The confirmation link expired. Please try changing your email again.
account.passwordHint: We’ll email you a secure link to choose a new password.
account.passwordSent: We emailed you a link to set a new password.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Log in to pick up where you left off.

signUp.title: Find your next idea
signUp.subtitle: Sign up to discover and save ideas you love.
signUp.terms: By continuing, you agree to Mosaic’s Terms of Service and acknowledge our Privacy Policy.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we’ll send you a link to reset it.
forgotPassword.sent: If an account exists for that email, a reset link is on its way. Check your inbox.

resetPassword.invalidBody: This reset link is missing or invalid.
resetPassword.doneBody: You can now sign in with your new password.
resetPassword.title: Choose a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Pick a password you don’t use anywhere else.
resetPassword.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

confirmEmail.loadingBody: Hang tight, this only takes a moment.
confirmEmail.okBody: Your account email has been updated. You can close this tab.
confirmEmail.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again from settings.
confirmEmail.invalidError: This link is invalid or has expired.

verifyEmail.missingBody: We couldn’t tell which email to verify.
verifyEmail.title: Check your inbox
verifyEmail.subtitle: We sent a 6-digit code to {email}. Enter it below to finish creating your account.
verifyEmail.resent: If your email needs verifying, a new code is on its way.
verifyEmail.invalidCode: That code is invalid or has expired.
